Sign in
Cloud storage built for privacy
Sync keeps your files safe, secure, and 100% private with end-to-end encryption
— not
even we can see them. Simple, fast, and always in your control.
TRY SYNC FREE
VIEW PLANS
Join over
2.7 million
super-productive teams in sync
Trusted by teams at:
Sync better together
Sync connects your internal teams, external partners, clients, customers, documents, files, computers and mobile devices together seamlessly, so everyone is always up-to-date and on the same page.
Access your files anywhere, any time
Access your files instantly from all your computers, mobile devices and the web. Work from home, from the office or from the most idea-inspiring places on the planet.
Share and collaborate securely with anyone
Create centralized folders that your internal team members and external collaborators can easily access. Manage permissions to keep your most important work protected at all times.
Send and receive files professionally
Share your documents through a custom-branded client file portal with your company logo on full display. Build client trust and set your business apart.
Transform your desktop with Sync CloudFiles
Free up storage space on your computer with files on demand. Browse your cloud files directly from Windows Explorer and Mac Finder. Never worry about storage space again.
Keep all your work always backed up
Sync backs up your company's documents in real time, ensuring you can restore any file, any time. Recover from ransomware, hardware failure and human error in an instant. Whew!
Security & compliance built for peace of mind
Sync includes groundbreaking privacy protection features, enterprise grade infrastructure and certification with the most widely accepted security and privacy regulations worldwide. Your data is safe with Sync.
To infinity and beyond!
Say goodbye to surprise transfer fees and stop worrying about running out of storage space again. Unlock the unlimited potential of your team with
unlimited cloud storage
and
unlimited data transfer
.
Get your best work done with
Sync Pro Teams Unlimited
. Imagine your life without limits.
GO UNLIMITED TODAY
Safe with Sync
We started Sync ten years ago with the goal of creating a secure cloud storage platform designed to protect your privacy. Sync has grown quite a bit since then but our mission hasn't changed. Today Sync is your safe space to share big ideas, store important information and collaborate on game-changing projects. To make the world a better place.
When life is in sync we create moments that inspire and memories that last. It's what being in Sync is all about.
Learn how Sync helps protect your privacy.
Take back control of your data
Join over 2.7 million people who trust Sync to keep their files private, secure, and always accessible.
Compare Plans
Get 5 GB Free

Sync core features:
Teams 1TB
Teams 2TB
Teams 10TB
Storage
The amount of cloud storage you get per user - you can upgrade to add more storage anytime
1 TB
2 TB
10 TB
Users
The number of people on your team (clients and customers you share with do not count as users)
3+
3+
3+
Data transfer
The number of people you can share with, and the amount of share data you can transfer per month
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Sharing and collaboration
Share your files and folders securely with anyone, request files easily too
Realtime backup and sync
Back up your files all in one place, so you never lose your files again
Access from anywhere
Access your Sync account from any Windows, Mac, iOS or Android device, or any web browser
Security & privacy protection:
End-to-end encryption
Sync's unique end-to-end encrypted storage platform ensures that only you have access to your files, which is the only way you can truly trust the cloud
No third-party tracking
Sync does not track, share or sell app usage data
SOC 2 Type 1
System and Organization Controls (SOC) 2 Type 1 compliance built-in
HIPAA compliance
Sync is committed to safeguarding personal healthcare information (PHI) by complying with government mandated regulations such as HIPAA
GDPR compliance
Sync is committed to safeguarding UK / EU personal information by complying with the EU GDPR
PIPEDA compliance
Sync is a perfect choice for conducting business worldwide, with EU, UK and Canadian compliance built in.
Data protection:
File history and recovery
Preview and restore previous versions of a file, including deleted files
180-day history
365-day history
365-day history
Advanced share controls
Controls like read-only access, expiry dates, download limits and notifications ensure you're always in control
Restrict downloads
Set links to preview only (no download) when sharing previewable document formats such as PDF, Excel, Word and image files
Password protected sharing
Password protect your links for added security
Password protected sharing
Manage per-user, per folder access permissions easily
Granular permissions
Remotely delete files when revoking access to shares, to maintain compliance
Remote share wipe
Disable lost or stolen devices easily, to keep your Sync account safe
Remote device lockout
Add a second layer of security to your account and devices
Two-factor auth (2FA)
Easily change your account details to transfer ownership at any time
Transfer account ownership
Easily change your account details to transfer ownership at any time
Productivity features:
Link sharing
Easily share files and folders to anyone, by sending secure links
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Team shared folders
Collaborate with internal and external users, by working out of the same set of folders and files
Unlimited
Unlimited
Unlimited
Custom branding
Replace the Sync logo with your company logo when sharing files externally to clients
File requests
Easily request files from multiple people, without giving them access to what others have sent
File comments
Enable comments when sharing with links to keep your communication all in one place
Document previews
Preview Microsoft Office document formats, PDF and image formats without downloading
Office 365 supported
Open, edit and save your documents in Sync with the Microsoft Office 365 desktop, mobile or online web browser apps (requires an Office 365 license)
Sync Vault
Archive your files in the cloud-only, to free up space on your computers and devices
Sync CloudFiles
Save space on your computer with files-on-demand. Manage which files in your Sync folder are cloud-only and which are local.
Desktop apps and integration
Sync integrates directly with Windows File Explorer and Mac Finder, making it easy to work the way you always do
Mobile apps
Access your files in Sync directly from your phone or tablet and automatically upload your photos and videos from your devices
Auto camera upload
Automatically upload photos taken on your mobile device to your Sync account
Offline access
Access your files, even if you don't have an internet connection
Notifications
Get instant notifications when someone has viewed a file you shared
Selective sync
With multiple computers, define which folders in your Sync folder download to each computer
Activity logs
Monitor user, file and account activity so you can audit who is doing what
Administration tools for teams:
Multi-user admin console
Administrator account to add, remove and manage separate accounts for each user (team member or employee)
Administrator account
Super-user account
Centralized billing
All employee accounts are billed together and newly added users are pro-rated
Manage user passwords
Set passwords for each user, allowing you quickly restore forgotten passwords or sign in as users to monitor activity
Role-based access controls (RBAC)
Configure user permissions by group
Admin role delegation
Enable multiple administrators as needed
2FA enforcement policy
Enforce 2FA per user, group, or company wide
File sharing data governance
Enable or disable link and folder sharing per user or group
Group-level share folder management
Assign  centralized folder access per user or group
Support:
99.9% uptime
Help guides
Priority email support
VIP response time
Scheduled phone support during business hours
Do you have a demo or free trial?
Yes! Unlock your massive cloud storage account with a zero-risk,
30-day free trial
. Get instant access and start uploading in seconds. Enjoy the freedom to do your best work with automatic syncing, easy sharing and worry-free privacy. You can start now and cancel anytime.
What methods of payment do you accept?
Sync accepts Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal and Discover. There are no hidden costs or setup fees, and you can upgrade or change plans at any time (upgrades are always pro-rated for fair billing).
Questions?
Contact us
at any time. We're real people ready to help you with any sales or technical support related questions you may have. And we love talking about security, privacy, and encryption too.
Join over
2.7 million
super-productive teams in sync
Trusted by teams at:
Start your Free Trial
Get 30-days of massive cloud storage absolutely risk-free.

hits.title: Securely store all your sensitive files with Sync.com
Ask HN: Sync.com – should I trust it, or not?
Ask HN: What privacy conscious cloud storage provider do you use?
Show HN: V-Agent and custom GPT, connecting GPT to multiple channels: phone, web
Models Handler Tool for Golang with Build in ORM and AutoSync Feature

analysis.name: Sync.com
analysis.value_proposition: End-to-end encrypted cloud storage and file sharing that keeps files 100% private — not even Sync can see them.
analysis.ideal_customer: Small business teams and privacy-conscious professionals in regulated industries (legal, healthcare, financial services) needing secure file sharing and client portals

features.name: end-to-end encryption
features.description: Zero-knowledge encryption so only the user can access their files
features.evidence_quote: end-to-end encryption — not even we can see them

features.name: file sharing
features.description: Share files and folders via secure links to anyone
features.evidence_quote: Easily share files and folders to anyone, by sending secure links

features.name: team shared folders
features.description: Collaborate with internal/external users in shared folders
features.evidence_quote: Collaborate with internal and external users, by working out of the same set of folders

features.name: custom branding
features.description: Replace Sync logo with company logo on shared links
features.evidence_quote: Replace the Sync logo with your company logo when sharing files externally

features.name: client file portal
features.description: Custom-branded portal for sharing files with clients
features.evidence_quote: Share your documents through a custom-branded client file portal

features.name: file requests
features.description: Request files from multiple people without exposing others' uploads
features.evidence_quote: Easily request files from multiple people, without giving them access

features.description: Comments on shared links to centralize communication
features.evidence_quote: Enable comments when sharing with links to keep your communication all in one place

features.evidence_quote: Open, edit and save your documents in Sync with the Microsoft Office 365 desktop, mobile or online

features.evidence_quote: Preview and restore previous versions of a file, including deleted files

No third-party tracking of app usage data

recent_ships.what: Changelog page not found (404) — no dated release notes surfaced
recent_ships.source: 404 Error – Sorry, the page you were looking for at this URL was not found.

tiers.name: Teams 1TB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 1 TB storage, advanced sharing, administrator account (3 user minimum)

tiers.name: Teams 2TB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 TB storage, custom branding, RBAC, admin delegation (3 user min)

tiers.name: Teams 10TB
tiers.headline_inclusions: 10 TB storage, custom branding, RBAC, admin delegation, VIP support

tiers.name: Sync Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: Custom requirements, account manager, training (100+ users)

pricing.notes: 3-user minimum on all Teams tiers; 100-user minimum on Enterprise. Annual billing shows ~25% discount; a promo '50% off for 1 year' is currently displayed. Full 30-day money-back guarantee. Teams 10TB offers 30-day trial.
